name: Wolves Team
short_description: The latest version is updated on October 9, 2019."Wolves Team" is a multiplayer gun fighting VR game , having 3 modes .PvC mode : All players are in one team , fighting zombies . Single player can play this mode . Killing the boss in limited time makes the mission completed .
detailed_description:
October 9, 2019 Game Modification:
1. Optimized the sight of sniper gun.

September 26, 2019 Game Modification:
1. Add player matching inquiry after creating the room , you can choose whether to match or not.
September 20, 2019 Game Modification:
1.Characters in the same team can see the green light on the top of your member`s head .
2.Blood change to green .
3. Optimize the information board showing after death , adding English version .
4. Add bulletin boards to the main interface , announcing the details of the revised version of the game .

"Wolves Team" is a multiplayer gun fighting VR game , having 3 modes .

PvC mode : All players are in one team , fighting zombies . Single player can play this mode . Killing the boss in limited time makes the mission completed .

PvP mode : Players are separated into 2 teams ( yellow or black ) , kill as many as possible in limited time , which team killing more win the game . This mode at least 2 players , up to 8 players .

tangled warfare mode : Players are separated individually , kill the others as many as possible in limited time , which one killing more win the game . This mode at least 2 players , up to 8 players .

It will shows the result at the end of the game .

Fit for party and competition .

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
